flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cuyahoga Community College District fell 30% between 2006 and 2009 (4.3% → 3.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cuyahoga Community College District fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cuyahoga Community College District fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.6k → $7.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Cuyahoga Community College District fell 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.2k → $8.2k).
